Childcare Facilities for Students

At Kadir Has University, we are dedicated to advancing

gender equality

by offering essential

childcare support

for both our staff and students. Acknowledging the challenge of balancing professional and academic responsibilities with family life, we have established

discount agreements

with various educational institutions to help ease the burden of childcare within our community.

In collaboration with

Doğa College

, Kadir Has University provides exclusive discounts for pre-school, nursery, primary, middle, and high school education. This initiative aims to meet the

educational needs of the children

of our university members, ensuring that working parents can access affordable, high-quality education for their children.

To take advantage of these benefits, full-time employees need only submit a “working document,” issued by the university, to the relevant educational institution during the enrollment process. We continue to expand our partnerships and actively work to increase the variety of

childcare options

available to our community.

As part of our ongoing commitment to

gender equality

, we also invite our staff and students to share their suggestions for new

Kindergarten and Nursery School

collaborations. The

Human Resources Department

reviews these recommendations and works to establish additional partnerships with suitable institutions.

For more details, members of our community may contact the

Human Resources Directorate

directly.
